messages.content: Write a python selenium program to go the the website https://yuntian-deng-chatgpt.hf.space/. Output code only, no comments.

```python
from selenium import webdriver

driver = webdriver.Chrome()
driver.get("https://yuntian-deng-chatgpt.hf.space/")
```
Update the program to click on a button with the selector #component-23.

```python
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

driver = webdriver.Chrome()
driver.get("https://yuntian-deng-chatgpt.hf.space/")

# wait for the button to be clickable and then click it
button = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#component-23")))
button.click()

# close the driver once done
driver.quit()
```
Update the program to accept the alert.

```python
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

driver = webdriver.Chrome()
driver.get("https://yuntian-deng-chatgpt.hf.space/")

# wait for the button to be clickable and then click it
button = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#component-23")))
button.click()

# wait for the alert to show up and accept it
alert = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.alert_is_present())
alert.accept()

# close the driver once done
driver.quit()
```
input the text "hello world" into the textarea with the selector: #component-5 > label > textarea

```python
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

driver = webdriver.Chrome()
driver.get("https://yuntian-deng-chatgpt.hf.space/")

# input text into the textarea
textarea = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#component-5 > label > textarea")))
textarea.send_keys("hello world")

# close the driver once done
driver.quit()
```
update the program to click the button with the selector #component-9

```python
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

driver = webdriver.Chrome()
driver.get("https://yuntian-deng-chatgpt.hf.space/")

# input text into the textarea
textarea = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#component-5 > label > textarea")))
textarea.send_keys("hello world")

# click on the send button
send_button = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#component-9")))
send_button.click()

# close the driver once done
driver.quit()
```
update the program to wait 5 seconds and print the text in element with the selector #chatbot > div.wrap.svelte-a99nd8 > div > div.message.bot.svelte-a99nd8.latest

```python
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

driver = webdriver.Chrome()
driver.get("https://yuntian-deng-chatgpt.hf.space/")

# input text into the textarea
textarea = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#component-5 > label > textarea")))
textarea.send_keys("hello world")

# click on the send button
send_button = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#component-9")))
send_button.click()

# wait for 5 seconds and then print the bot's latest message
latest_message = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#chatbot > div.wrap.svelte-a99nd8 > div > div.message.bot.svelte-a99nd8.latest")))
EC.text_to_be_present_in_element((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#chatbot > div.wrap.svelte-a99nd8 > div > div.message.bot.svelte-a99nd8.latest"), latest_message.text)
print(latest_message.text)

# close the driver once done
driver.quit()
```
update the program to ask the user for a prompt to put into the textarea instead of "hello world"

```python
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC

driver = webdriver.Chrome()
driver.get("https://yuntian-deng-chatgpt.hf.space/")

# get user input for prompt to enter into the textarea
prompt = input("Enter a prompt for the chatbot: ")

# input the prompt into the textarea
textarea = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#component-5 > label > textarea")))
textarea.send_keys(prompt)

# click on the send button
send_button = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#component-9")))
send_button.click()

# wait for 5 seconds and then print the bot's latest message
latest_message = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#chatbot > div.wrap.svelte-a99nd8 > div > div.message.bot.svelte-a99nd8.latest")))
EC.text_to_be_present_in_element((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#chatbot > div.wrap.svelte-a99nd8 > div > div.message.bot.svelte-a99nd8.latest"), latest_message.text)
print(latest_message.text)

# close the driver once done
driver.quit()
```
update the program to run the webdriver headless

```python
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options

# configure chrome options for headless mode
chrome_options = Options()
chrome_options.add_argument("--headless")
chrome_options.add_argument("--disable-gpu")

driver = webdriver.Chrome(options=chrome_options)
driver.get("https://yuntian-deng-chatgpt.hf.space/")

# get user input for prompt to enter into the textarea
prompt = input("Enter a prompt for the chatbot: ")

# input the prompt into the textarea
textarea = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#component-5 > label > textarea")))
textarea.send_keys(prompt)

# click on the send button
send_button = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#component-9")))
send_button.click()

# wait for 5 seconds and then print the bot's latest message
latest_message = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#chatbot > div.wrap.svelte-a99nd8 > div > div.message.bot.svelte-a99nd8.latest")))
EC.text_to_be_present_in_element((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#chatbot > div.wrap.svelte-a99nd8 > div > div.message.bot.svelte-a99nd8.latest"), latest_message.text)
print(latest_message.text)

# close the driver once done
driver.quit()
```
update the program to add a loop for the user to ask questions

```python
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options

# configure chrome options for headless mode
chrome_options = Options()
chrome_options.add_argument("--headless")
chrome_options.add_argument("--disable-gpu")

driver = webdriver.Chrome(options=chrome_options)
driver.get("https://yuntian-deng-chatgpt.hf.space/")

while True:
    # get user input for prompt to enter into the textarea
    prompt = input("You: ")

    # input the prompt into the textarea
    textarea = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#component-5 > label > textarea")))
    textarea.send_keys(prompt)

    # click on the send button
    send_button = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.element_to_be_clickable((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#component-9")))
    send_button.click()

    # wait for 5 seconds and then print the bot's latest message
    latest_message = WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(EC.presence_of_element_located((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#chatbot > div.wrap.svelte-a99nd8 > div > div.message.bot.svelte-a99nd8.latest")))
    EC.text_to_be_present_in_element((By.CSS_SELECTOR, "#chatbot > div.wrap.svelte-a99nd8 > div > div.message.bot.svelte-a99nd8.latest"), latest_message.text)
    print("Bot:", latest_message.text)

# close the driver once done
driver.quit()
```

Note: Since this program contains an infinite loop, it needs to be stopped manually by the user (with `Ctrl + C` on the command line or by clicking the stop button in your IDE).
